p1|HAB.summary: Material composition of the majority of walls or exterior walls of the dwelling.

p2|HAB.summary: Material composition of the majority of the roof of the dwelling.

p3|HAB.summary: Material composition of the majority of the floor of the dwelling.

p4|HAB.summary: Number of rooms used for sleeping, excluding hallways.

p4_1|HAB.summary: Total number of rooms in the dwelling, excluding hallways and bathrooms.

p5|HAB.summary: Whether the dwelling has a dedicated cooking room.

p5a|HAB.summary: Type of cooking appliance used in the dwelling.

p5_1|HAB.summary: Whether people sleep in the room where cooking occurs.

p6|HAB.summary: Amenities or services available in the dwelling (unspecified in question text).

p7|HAB.summary: Number of days per week that water is available to the household.

p7_1|HAB.summary: Method or schedule by which water is delivered to the household.

p8|HAB.summary: Services or utilities available in the dwelling (unspecified in question text).

p9|HAB.summary: Whether water or sanitation services are used exclusively by household members.

p10|HAB.summary: Type of drainage or sewage system available in the dwelling.

p11|HAB.summary: Whether the dwelling has electric lighting.

p11_1|HAB.summary: Whether electric lighting is available on the street where the dwelling is located.

p12|HAB.summary: Primary fuel type used for cooking in the dwelling.

p13|HAB.summary: Whether the dwelling is owned by a person living in it.

p14|HAB.summary: Owner or entity to whom the dwelling belongs.

p15|HAB.summary: Tenure status or ownership classification of the dwelling.

p15_1|HAB.summary: Person or entity who lends or manages the dwelling if not owner-occupied.

p16|HAB.summary: Whether the dwelling was purchased pre-built or constructed by the owner.

p17|HAB.summary: Person or entity who purchased the dwelling.

p18|HAB.summary: Institution through which the dwelling was acquired if purchased via formal financing.

p19|HAB.summary: Whether the respondent owns other properties or real estate beyond the primary dwelling.

p20|HAB.summary: Number of additional properties or real estate owned by the respondent.

p21_1|HAB.summary: Whether the respondent owns a commercial or retail property.

p21_2|HAB.summary: Whether the respondent owns an apartment or condominium.

p21_3|HAB.summary: Whether the respondent owns a house.

p21_4|HAB.summary: Whether the respondent owns a warehouse or storage facility.

p21_5|HAB.summary: Whether the respondent owns a ranch or agricultural property.

p21_6|HAB.summary: Whether the respondent owns undeveloped land or a lot.

p21_7|HAB.summary: Whether the respondent owns other types of real estate not listed in previous categories.

p22|HAB.summary: Geographic location or zone where the respondent's additional properties are situated.

p23|HAB.summary: Type of terrain or ground on which the primary dwelling is built.

p24|HAB.summary: Geographic or administrative location of the dwelling.

p26t|HAB.summary: Number of different transportation modes required to reach the respondent's workplace.

p27_1|HAB.summary: Whether the respondent has ever used train transportation.

p28|HAB.summary: Type or classification of the dwelling structure.

p29|HAB.summary: Geographic or administrative location of the dwelling.

p30|HAB.summary: Whether each room in the dwelling has at least one window.

p32|HAB.summary: Estimated total surface area or size of the dwelling including all rooms and spaces.

p34|HAB.summary: Whether the respondent or household members invested in dwelling maintenance during the current year.

p34_1|HAB.summary: Reasons why the respondent has not invested in dwelling maintenance.

p35_1|HAB.summary: Whether the respondent has remodeled or upgraded infrastructure as part of dwelling maintenance.

p36_1|HAB.summary: Whether the dwelling has a radio or radio-cassette player.

p36_6|HAB.summary: Whether the dwelling has a refrigerator.

p36_8|HAB.summary: Whether the dwelling has a mobile phone or cellular telephone.

p36_9|HAB.summary: Whether the dwelling has a personal automobile or pickup truck.

p36_10|HAB.summary: Whether the dwelling has a computer.

p36_11|HAB.summary: Whether the dwelling has a laundry sink or wash basin.

p36_12|HAB.summary: Whether the dwelling has a kitchen sink or counter basin.

p36_13|HAB.summary: Whether the dwelling has a bathroom sink or washbasin.

p36_14|HAB.summary: Whether the dwelling has a shower or bathing facility.

p36_15|HAB.summary: Whether the dwelling has a cistern or underground water storage tank.

p36_16|HAB.summary: Whether the dwelling has a rooftop water tank or tinaco.

p36_17|HAB.summary: Whether the dwelling has a water storage tank or reservoir.

p36_18|HAB.summary: Whether the dwelling has a gas water heater or boiler.

p36_20|HAB.summary: Whether the dwelling has a water pump.

p36_21|HAB.summary: Whether the dwelling has heating or climate control.

p36_22|HAB.summary: Whether the dwelling has solar panels for electricity generation.

p36_23|HAB.summary: Whether the dwelling has solar water heaters on the rooftop.

p36_24|HAB.summary: Whether the dwelling has a gas tank.

p36_25|HAB.summary: Whether the dwelling has a stationary or fixed gas tank.

p36_26|HAB.summary: Whether the dwelling has rainwater collection wells or cisterns.

p36_27|HAB.summary: Whether the dwelling has absorption wells for wastewater.

p36_28|HAB.summary: Whether the dwelling has permeable concrete in the parking area.

p37_1|HAB.summary: Whether the street where the dwelling is located has electric lighting.

p38_8|HAB.summary: Duration for which the street has had other unspecified services.

p39a_1|HAB.summary: Whether a school is located near the dwelling.

p39b_1|HAB.summary: Whether the respondent uses or accesses school services near the dwelling.

p39b_2|HAB.summary: Whether the respondent uses or accesses health clinic or hospital services near the dwelling.

p39b_3|HAB.summary: Whether the respondent uses or accesses market, street market, or retail stores near the dwelling.

p39b_5|HAB.summary: Whether the respondent uses or accesses police services near the dwelling.

p39b_7|HAB.summary: Whether the respondent uses or accesses religious institutions or places of worship near the dwelling.

p39b_11|HAB.summary: Whether the respondent uses or accesses children's play areas or parks near the dwelling.

p39b_13|HAB.summary: Whether the respondent uses or accesses main transportation routes near the dwelling.

p39b_15|HAB.summary: Whether the respondent uses or accesses other unspecified services near the dwelling.

p40_1|HAB.summary: Whether the household pays for piped water service.

p42_1|HAB.summary: Whether the dwelling is constructed with natural or traditional materials.

p43_1|HAB.summary: Extent to which external noise is bothersome to the respondent at the dwelling.

p45_1|HAB.summary: Importance of neighbors' behavior to the respondent's household quality of life.

p46_1|HAB.summary: Respondent's satisfaction level with the size or spaciousness of the dwelling.

p47|HAB.summary: Respondent's overall quality rating of housing in Mexico.

p50_1|HAB.summary: Primary solution the respondent believes would address housing problems in Mexico.

p51|HAB.summary: Entity or institution the respondent believes is primarily responsible for solving housing problems in Mexico.
